rationale: A universal sanitizer is not applicable because Press intentionally renders several trusted templates and separately sanitized renderer outputs. Exact AST fingerprints make every existing HTML serializer and dynamic import occurrence reviewable while prohibited executable sinks remain at zero.

classifications.controlled-parser: A controlled DOM serializer or parser bridge whose producer is separately bounded.
classifications.empty-clear: A constant empty-string assignment that removes child markup without parsing HTML.
classifications.escaped-ui-template: A first-party UI template whose variable text and attributes use bounded escaping helpers.
classifications.executable-extension-allowlist: A reviewed non-literal import restricted to declared executable extensions.
classifications.i18n-bundle-html: A versioned first-party translation value intentionally rendered as localized markup.
classifications.literal-import: A source-literal dynamic import whose executable module path is reviewable in place.
classifications.reviewed-callback-control: A callback supplied through a reviewed higher-order timer boundary.
classifications.static-template: A source-static or constant-table UI template without user-controlled HTML.
classifications.trusted-theme-template: A trusted first-party theme or component template rendered through its owned contract.
